items.title: This NotebookLM + Claude Code Workflow Is Insane
items.description: This video shows how to combine the power of Claude Code with Notebook.LM using Notebook.LM-PY, which converts Notebook ...
extracted_patterns: Use NotebookLM as a grounded knowledge base layer before passing context to Claude Code for execution — separates research/synthesis from coding
Feed competitor research CSVs into NotebookLM notebooks, then query from Claude Code agents via MCP to inform product direction decisions
Chain NotebookLM → Claude Code for content generation: use NLM knowledge base to write SEO blog posts competing with analyzed competitors
Use notebooklm-mcp (nlm-py open-source library) to give Claude Code programmatic access to NotebookLM features (create/list/rename notebooks, add sources, extract Q&A, download audio/video/slides)
Set NotebookLM research mode to 'deep' or 'fast' depending on task urgency when calling from agents
Store persistent knowledge bases (competitor research, documentation) in NotebookLM notebooks rather than re-feeding raw documents each session
